prompt: A premium magazine cover design for social media post. Large bold text "ПОЧЕМУ ОН МОЛЧИТ" in elegant high-contrast Didone serif font, white color, thin serifs, bold vertical strokes, taking 70% of the image area. Background: darkened photo of a confident elegant woman with dark hair and auburn tips, wearing a white shirt, looking at camera with slight smile. The woman is semi-transparent, serving as background texture (30% opacity). Dark gradient overlay from top. Color palette: black, white text, bordeaux (#8B0000) subtle accent. Style: luxury fashion magazine cover, Vogue aesthetic. Professional typography. Clean minimalist layout. Small sans-serif subtitle "мужская психология" at the bottom.

Minimalist quote design for social media. deep bordeaux (#5C1A1A) solid color background. Text "Когда женщина начинает объяснять — она уже проиграла" in elegant serif font (Cormorant Garamond style, italic), white color, centered, medium size, taking 80% of image area. Below the quote, small sans-serif text "— Зинаида" aligned right. At the bottom center, a small diamond symbol as logo. Thin horizontal line above the author name. Clean, sophisticated, editorial look. No photos, no illustrations. Only typography and color.

Cinematic photorealistic scene. A couple sitting back to back on a couch, emotional distance, warm evening interior light, moody atmosphere. Color palette: warm amber, brown, golden tones. Shallow depth of field, bokeh background. Shot on 85mm lens, golden hour lighting. Style: documentary photography, NOT glossy or artificial. Film grain texture, cinematic color grading.
